goal: Diff-based code review in fresh context
acceptance_criteria: AC1: checkCommandSkillWiring passes for commands with correct output wiring
AC2: test-design Output references integration test pattern and path
AC3: parseRequiredArtifacts throws descriptive error for malformed tables
AC4: implement.md includes artifact verification step
AC5: test-design.md includes artifact verification step
AC6: tdd skill has Required Artifacts with 4-column format
AC7: parseRequiredArtifacts returns null for skills without the section
AC8: conditional artifacts get same full pattern+path check
AC9: checkArtifactWiring passes when at least one of multiple paths matches
AC10: existing contract tests still exist
AC11: negative fixture gap detection throws with actionable error
F1: checkCommandSkillWiring throws named error on missing skill file
F4: extractSection preserves sub-headings deeper than target
